title: Date automation, setting a new date
excerpt:
Hi I am looking to automate this scenario: 
When a date arrives, do something, than set the date to the same day next month.

posts.author: asafm (Asaf)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi I am looking to automate this scenario:
When a date arrives, do something, than set the date to the same day next month.

posts.author: lwatkins31 (Lee Watkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Asaf, you should be able to do this for the status column. I’ve created a similar automation in the screenshot below:

When [Date] arrives, Set [Status] to [Approved] and then push [Date] by [# days, months, weeks].

Screenshot 2024-05-21 at 13.22.231058×722 30.8 KB

Hope this helps!
